claim_checks.claim_text: The effect of absences on grades is not estimable from one absence snapshot.
evidence_refs: absence_data one row and score_series three rows
claim_checks.rationale: The response correctly separates attendance context from score history.

holistic_rationale: The response precisely states the missed-session proportion and correctly refuses to invent an association, while offering an evidence-collection next step.
